headlines.description: — Josh Allen took a pounding and doled out punishment — looking every bit like the reigning MVP.
headlines.shortLinkText: Josh Allen carries Bills to 27-24 win at Jags for Buffalo's first road playoff victory in 33 years

headlines.description: — Jauan Jennings hid his eyes behind sunglasses, but could not hide his emotions with the San Francisco 49ers set to play an NFC postseason rubber match in Seattle.
headlines.shortLinkText: Purdy, 49ers eliminate defending Super Bowl champion Eagles with 23-19 win in wild-card game

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — Patriots coach Mike Vrabel talked to his team about being prepared to bleed as New England entered its first playoff game since the 2021 season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Maye throws late TD pass and Patriots' defense roughs up Herbert, Chargers in 16-3 playoff win
